description: Design an advanced heliocentric trajectory using the Oberth effect for an Interstellar Probe, starting from the initial Keplerian state provided in ~/Desktop/interstellar_oberth_baseline.txt (dropping from Jupiter to a close solar perihelion). Using a Sun-centered GMAT simulation (SunMJ2000Eq coordinate system), target a C3Energy of exactly 1500.0 km^2/s^2 with respect to the Sun via a prograde impulsive burn in the VNB frame at solar periapsis. Save the resulting GMAT script to ~/GMAT_output/oberth_maneuver.script. Record the required Delta V magnitude, the spacecraft's inertial velocity immediately after the burn, and the final C3 to ~/GMAT
